subject: add support for dash in helm deploy onap chart name
commit_message:
add support for dash in helm deploy onap chart name

Issue-ID: OOM-2285
Signed-off-by: Abdelmuhaimen Seaudi <abdelmuhaimen.seaudi@orange.com>
Change-Id: I16d92d2194795bdb25b5055d91d8182dc6f9f0cd

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Please don't. After we started using common.release instead of .Release.Name we are stripping the part after first - to simplify pod naming and allow to easily share secrets between charts
